## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::GamepadDirectional;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        GamepadDirectional { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
direction, arrow, controller, navigation, button, move, pointer, arrowhead, console, game, gaming

## Categories
gaming, devices
